escalation.rationale: US-Iran ceasefire announcement reduces immediate escalation despite ongoing missile strikes and infrastructure threats.

ticker_items: Trump announces two-week US-Iran ceasefire for negotiations
Iran fires missiles at Saudi oil facilities as deadline approached
Ukraine strikes Russian Black Sea oil terminal with drones
Czech Republic plans to cut military aid to Ukraine

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones attacked Caspian Pipeline Consortium terminal handling 1.5% of global oil supply.

middle_east.description: Iran fired missiles at Saudi Arabia's oil-rich Eastern Province as Trump deadline approached.
Iran strikes at Israel as part of coordinated attack with Hezbollah and Houthis.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

middle_east.text: The entire country can be taken out in one night, and that night might be tomorrow night
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Efforts to end the war were approaching a critical stage
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan
middle_east.title: Ambassador

observers.description: Pakistan successfully mediated between Iran and the United States to achieve a two-week ceasefire. Iranian ambassador praised Pakistan's role in bringing negotiations to a critical stage for ending the conflict.
New right-wing populist government plans to cut military aid to Ukraine and restrict refugee protections. This represents a significant shift from previous Czech support for Ukrainian war effort.
Growing calls for 'Polexit' are becoming central theme in power struggle between Donald Tusk's centrist coalition and hard-right populists. EU membership support faces unprecedented challenges.

financial.notes: IMF warns Middle East war will lead to higher inflation and slower global growth.

update_log.text: Al Jazeera updates casualty tracker showing 2,076 Iranian deaths from US-Israeli attacks
World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire announcement and urges lasting peace in Middle East
Trump announces two-week ceasefire allowing negotiations on Iran's 10-point peace plan
Iran fires missiles at Saudi Eastern Province as Trump infrastructure destruction deadline neared
